evals.name: full-sweep
evals.prompt:
Fix all issues: ```tsx import { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, Bell, Settings, ChevronRight, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; interface Project { id: string; name: string; status: 'active' | 'archived'; progress: number; updatedAt: string; } export default function ProjectsDashboard({ projects }: { projects: Project[] }) { const [query, setQuery] = useState(''); const [showArchived, setShowArchived] = useState(false); const filtered = projects.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) && (showArchived || p.status === 'active') ); return (

Projects

Your Workspace

Manage and track all your projects seamlessly in one place.

setQuery(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search projects..." className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-lg text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-500 outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 transition-colors duration-200" />
{filtered.map((project) => (

{project.name}

{project.status}
Progress {project.progress}%
Updated {project.updatedAt}
))}
{filtered.length === 0 && (

No projects found

Try adjusting your search or filters.

)}

Activity Feed

John Doe created a new project

2 hours ago

Sarah Chen completed milestone 3

5 hours ago

); } ``` Output fixed code only.
evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all ui-ux rules

assertions.trap: fontFamily: 'Inter, system-ui, sans-serif' — Inter is the most common AI default
assertions.description: Inter is banned for premium/creative work. Use Geist, Outfit, Cabinet Grotesk, or Satoshi

assertions.trap: Uses 3 font weights: font-semibold (600), font-bold (700), font-medium (500)
assertions.description: 2 font weights for UI: normal (400/500) and bold (600/700). Pick one from each tier, not three

assertions.trap: font-semibold (600) paired with font-medium (500) — only 100 weight apart
assertions.description: Dramatic weight pairing: 400+700, not 600+500. Weight contrast must be visible

assertions.trap: grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 for project cards — the classic AI card grid
assertions.description: 3-column equal card grids are banned. Use asymmetric grid, zig-zag, or auto-fit minmax

assertions.trap: 'Manage and track all your projects seamlessly in one place' — filler with 'seamlessly'
assertions.description: Filler words banned: 'seamlessly', 'elevate', 'unleash', 'next-gen'. Use concrete verbs

assertions.trap: 'Learn More' link on project cards — generic, says nothing about the destination
assertions.description: Button/link text must be specific verb+noun: 'View details', 'Open project', not 'Learn More'

assertions.trap: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) in the hover-card CSS — pure black shadow
assertions.description: Never pure black shadows. Tint to background hue: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08) or similar

assertions.trap: transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease in CSS and transition-shadow on cards
assertions.description: Never transition box-shadow directly. Use pseudo-element opacity technique

assertions.trap: Bell and Settings icon buttons have no aria-label
assertions.description: Icon buttons must have aria-label for screen reader users

assertions.trap: Search input uses placeholder only, no associated <label> or aria-label
assertions.description: Form inputs need associated labels for accessibility. Placeholder is not a label

assertions.trap: outline-none on search input without :focus-visible ring replacement
assertions.description: Never outline-none without a :focus-visible replacement. Keyboard users need visible focus

assertions.trap: focus:border-indigo-500 — using border change for focus instead of ring
assertions.description: Use focus-visible:ring-2 ring-offset, not border color change, for focus indication

assertions.trap: Empty state is just 2 lines of text — no icon, no CTA, no illustration
assertions.description: Empty states need: icon/illustration, why it's empty, CTA to take action, help link. This is an onboarding moment

assertions.trap: Empty state is text-center with no visual weight — looks like an afterthought
assertions.description: Empty states are onboarding opportunities. Needs illustration, clear message, primary CTA button

assertions.trap: 'John Doe' in activity feed — the most generic placeholder name
assertions.description: Generic names banned. Use creative, realistic names that feel intentional

assertions.trap: 'Sarah Chen' — common AI-generated diverse placeholder name
assertions.description: AI-typical diverse placeholder names are a tell. Use distinctive, contextual names

assertions.trap: Activity feed items wrapped in bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-lg inside an already-bordered section
assertions.description: Cards inside a card section — flatten hierarchy with spacing or divide-y, not nested containers

assertions.trap: Uses zinc-100, zinc-200, zinc-300, zinc-400, zinc-500, zinc-600 — 6 text shades
assertions.description: 2-3 text colors only: primary (dark/light), secondary (grey), tertiary (light grey). 6 shades is noise

assertions.trap: emerald-400/500 for status + indigo-400/500/600 for actions — two accent colors
assertions.description: Max 1 accent color with saturation < 80%. Status can use semantic color but both shouldn't be saturated

assertions.trap: transition-colors duration-200 is fine, but transition-shadow duration-300 triggers box-shadow repaint
assertions.description: Animating box-shadow causes expensive repaints. Use pseudo-element opacity technique instead

assertions.trap: Progress percentage displayed without font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums
assertions.description: Numbers that change (percentages, counts) need tabular-nums so layout doesn't shift

assertions.trap: h2 'Your Workspace' heading without text-wrap: balance
assertions.description: Headings should use text-wrap: balance to prevent orphans and awkward line breaks

assertions.trap: h2 uses text-3xl font-bold — hierarchy through size alone, h3 uses font-semibold only
assertions.description: Control hierarchy with weight + color + space, not just font-size scaling

assertions.trap: Component only renders populated and empty states — no loading/skeleton state
assertions.description: Every data-fetching view needs loading state with skeleton screens matching content layout

assertions.trap: No error state handling — what if the project fetch fails?
assertions.description: Error states need: what went wrong, why, how to fix, retry button. Never just omit them

assertions.trap: border-zinc-800, border-zinc-700 — hardcoded border colors instead of alpha tokens
assertions.description: Use semi-transparent borders (border-white/10) that adapt across themes, not hardcoded zinc shades

assertions.trap: Section heading 'Your Workspace' uses centered-ish layout with mx-auto
assertions.description: With default DESIGN_VARIANCE=8, centered hero/H1 sections are banned. Use left-aligned + asymmetric

assertions.trap: Multiple transition-colors and hover animations with no @media (prefers-reduced-motion)
assertions.description: Reduced motion support is not optional. Provide @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives

assertions.trap: Buttons have hover states but no :active press feedback
assertions.description: Active state needs tactile feedback: -translate-y-[1px] or scale-[0.98] to simulate physical press

assertions.trap: gap-4 on grid, gap-3 in header, space-y-3 in feed — no deliberate spacing rhythm/scale
assertions.description: Define a spacing scale and use it deliberately. Spacing should create rhythm, not be arbitrary

assertions.trap: Outer card rounded-xl (12px) contains inner items with rounded-lg (8px) — not concentric
assertions.description: Concentric border radius: outer = inner + padding. Same-level elements should share one radius

assertions.trap: 'Manage and track all your projects' is ok, but description is directive-style filler
assertions.description: Subtitles should describe concrete value, not restate the obvious. Cut redundant copy

assertions.trap: Status shown as colored text badge — uses emerald for 'active', looks like traffic light UI
assertions.description: Status indicators should be semantic and accessible, not rely on color alone. Add icon or pattern

assertions.trap: Search icon inside input is decorative but not marked aria-hidden
assertions.description: Decorative icons must have aria-hidden='true' to avoid screen reader noise

assertions.trap: ease used in CSS transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease — not a deliberate easing curve
assertions.description: Don't use generic 'ease'. Use specific curves: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for ease-out-expo
